title: mastixia arborea subsp. macrophylla
intro: Mastixia arborea subsp. macrophylla, also known as the giant Mastixia or giant Mastixia tree, is a plant species within the Annonaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mastixia arborea subsp. macrophylla include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and support immune function. Traditionally, herbal preparations of this plant are made into teas, infusions, or tonics, and are often used in Southeast Asian traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
